LanguageData.VHGE_HelixienGenerator.description: Produces power by consuming helixien gas. Must be connected to a gas pipe network.
LanguageData.VHGE_HelixienGenerator.label: gas powered generator
LanguageData.VHGE_IndustrialHelixienGenerator.descrip: Produces a large amount of power by consuming helixien gas. Must be connected to a gas pipe network.
LanguageData.VHGE_IndustrialHelixienGenerator.label: industrial gas powered generator
